race.comment: RISING REVOLUTION (8) resumes after chipping away late on debut when third to Jellicious over 1100m at Hawkesbury last September. Wasn't pushed out in her only trial over 900m at Rosehill. Lugging but goes on and will get through the going. YATTAZOU (2) had mixed luck in her two runs back and this looks easier over the shorter trip. Up sharply in distance with a disappointing seventh over 1300m at Warwick Farm. Assess on the good second first-up over 1100m at Canterbury. Tongue-tie goes on and no shock to see her take this out. REIGN 'EM IN (7) has impressed in all three career runs and can overcome the sticky gate today. Sat on the fast tempo with a close-up third over 1000m at Muswellbrook. Key jockey change and expected to go close. MONOCRU (6) began awkwardly and never got into the contest when seventh over 1000m at Hawkesbury. Finished third here first-up and capable of better. The chances don't end there.
